headline: Employers Embrace AI for Benefits — Employees Remain Cautious
summary: NEWARK, N.J., June 22, 2026--Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE: PRU) released a new study today showing how employer optimism about artificial intelligence in the workplace benefits experience is outpacing employee willingness to use these tools for benefits-related support.
